name: Country Captain Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet that can hold the chicken in one layer.
2. Add onion, sweet pepper, and garlic; cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Transfer the mixture to a saucepan.
4. Add oil to the skillet.
5. In a bowl, combine flour, salt, and pepper.
6. Roll the chicken pieces in the flour mixture.
7. Cook the chicken in hot oil until nicely browned; drain off any excess oil.
8. Add tomatoes and their liquid, chicken stock, and curry powder to the sauce with the cooked vegetables.
9. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
10. Pour over the chicken and simmer for 15 minutes.
11. Stir in coconut and raisins; simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
12. Test the chicken for doneness and check seasoning.
13. Arrange the chicken in a serving bowl.
14. Garnish with sliced almonds and parsley.
15. Serve with boiled rice.
